mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, amount, status, settled_at, bank_name, account_number, account_holder FROM settlements WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY settled_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, amount, status, settled_at, bank_name, account_number, account_holder FROM settlements ORDER BY settled_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO settlements (id, user_id, amount, status, bank_name, account_number, account_holder) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{bankName}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountHolder})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM settlements WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 'REJECTED'
